With the advent of studies at the French Academy in Rome, the male nude became, on the contrary, the most important exercise for the student painter, to the point where a work portraying a naked man became known as “Academy Study”. Look at the figure in “Charon Ferrying the Shades” by Subleyras or the “Male Nude or Hector” by David. The male nude also represents the heroic nude, for example in Ingres’ painting “Oedipus and the Sphinx”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two favourite Blue Peter presenters Sarah Greene and Peter Duncan are in the company of Natasha Raskin and Catherine Southon as they hunt for antiques around Surrey, Hertfordshire and North West London. Peter detours to learn how hockey became a popular sport the world over while keen aviator Sarah sees how the Battle of Britain was won. An incredible haul of antiques, including chimney pots, Pinocchio and a pair of African fertility figures, go under the gavel at an auction in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Firminy by Le Corbusier
programme.desc: The Firminy site represents one of the strong ideas of Le Corbusier, the merger and coexistence between three human activities: cultural life and leisure, sports, and worship.

programme.title: Street Art Lyon, viewpoints
programme.desc: The official art (with the co-ownerships) of the painted walls of Lyon hides its origins: the art of the wild graffiti.

programme.title: Printing photography
programme.desc: Photographer Bruno Dewaele asks Antoine Agoudjian for several large silver prints as he prepares an exhibition.

programme.title: Artist portrait : Frederic Bourcier
programme.desc: Since 25 years, Frederic Bourcier is a mode photograph, he is a specialist of « beauty » and « outdoor » photography.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts etait la toute première retrospective consacree au portrait dÉdouard Manet. Couvrant lensemble de la carrière de cet artiste enigmatique et parfois controverse, lexposition a rassemble des œuvres provenant dEurope, dAsie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet na jamais fait lobjet dune exposition, bien quil represente environ la moitie de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalites litteraires, politiques et artistiques de lepoque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la societe parisienne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Phil Grabsky, realisateur recompense à plusieurs reprises, pose un regard neuf sur celui qui est sans conteste l’artiste le plus aime au monde en utilisant les mots du peintre lui-meme. Moi, Claude Monet revèle de nouvelles facettes de l’homme qui a donne naissance au mouvement impressionniste grâce à un tableau et qui fut certainement l’un des peintres les plus influents et renommes du XIXe et du debut du XXe siècle. Tourne à travers l’Europe, sur les lieux où il a peint, Moi, Claude Monet est une exploration filmique inedite et intime de certains des decors cultes les plus apprecies de l’art occidental.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les legendes de la scène et de lecran, Charles Dance et Geraldine James, rejoignent les experts en antiquites Natasha Raskin et Will Axon pour cette excursion dans le Wiltshire.Charles trouve une paire de vases en argent de lepoque edouardienne quil espère rentabiliser lors dune vente aux enchères dans lEssex. Geraldine, elle, tombe sur un homme dans la rue avec un secretaire Empire français du XIXe siècle. Il lui en coûte une petite fortune - le pari sera-t-il gagnant ?Charles se retrouve dans le cockpit dun très vieil helicoptère tandis que Geraldine apprend comment un petit quartier de Swindon datant de 170 ans a influence la creation du NHS moderne.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, well talk with Emmanuel Bastien, photographer and videographer. For the past 20 years, he has shot documentaries, commercials, fashion and news for major networks. During his lifetime, he has witnessed political instability and poverty in India, Cambodia and Mali, which has led him to focus on social issues and personal struggles.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: La vision des tours massives du château d’Angers est un choc pour l’œil comme pour l’esprit. En ce lieux mysterieux, se cache la symbolique obscure de la grandiose teinture de l’Apocalypse, de la fin du monde et du jugement dernier. Mais ce château de cœur de ville possède aussi un voisinage d’artistes, d’antiquaires et d’artisans, tous passionnes d’histoire angevine et qui collaborent avec les representants du Centre des Monuments Nationaux, gestionnaire de ce lieu historique. Ainsi cette bâtisse destinee à la guerre et qui fut longtemps une sombre prison, devient par le jeu des volontes conjuguees un pôle touristique et d’insertion pour des jeunes de tous horizons.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Les impressionnistes - et lhomme qui les a crees
programme.desc: Ce sont les artistes les plus populaires du monde. Les œuvres de Cezanne, Monet, Degas et leurs compatriotes representent des richesses inestimables. Mais qui etaient-ils vraiment ? Comment et pourquoi ont-ils revolutionne l’histoire de l’art ? Qu’est-ce qui se cache derrière leur succès intemporel ? Pour repondre à ces questions, le documentaire a obtenu un accès unique à une grande exposition mettant l’accent sur le collectionneur d’art parisien du 19ème siècle, Paul Durand-Ruel, l’expert des Impressionnistes qui prit la decision courageuse d’exposer les Impressionnistes à New York en 1886 et ainsi introduire la societe americaine à la peinture française moderne.

programme.title: Manet - Degas, a troubled friendship
programme.desc: In 1917 the art world is ablaze: the famous painter and sculptor Edgar Degas has just died, leaving behind him a collection rich of dozens of works from Edouard Manet.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Vermeer and music - the art of love and leisure
programme.desc: La National Gallery de Londres propose un nouveau regard sur lun des plus grands artistes de tous les temps, Johannes Vermeer. Il est le peintre de la celèbre toile “La Jeune Fille à la perle”. Dans une exposition intitulee "Vermeer et la musique : Lart de lamour et des loisirs

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Qui etait Frida Kahlo ? Voyagez dans la vie dune veritable icône, decouvrez son art et la verite qui se cache derrière sa vie souvent mouvementee. La combinaison dinterviews, de commentaires et dune exploration detaillee de lart de Kahlo, offre un tresor de couleurs et un festin de vitalite. Ce documentaire personnel et intime offre un accès privilegie à ses œuvres, et met en lumière sa creativite febrile, sa resilience et sa soif inegalee pour la vie.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The spectacular sculptures and paintings of Michelangelo seem so familiar to us, but what do we really know about this renaissance genius? Who was this ambitious and passionate man? A virtuoso craftsman, Michelangelo’s artistry is evident in everything he touched. Beautiful and diverse works such as the towering statue of David, the deeply moving Pietà in the Papal Basilica of St. Peter and his tour-de-force, the Sistine Chapel ceiling still leave us breathless today.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Michelangelo Merisi (1571-1610), born in Caravaggio, is known as a wicked artist who had to flee Rome in 1606 after killing a man. But Caravaggio is above all a painter who changed the face of painting at the very beginning of the 17th century. Notice his use of colour in the people emerging from a dark background, like his “Bacchus” or “David”. One of his masterpieces is the cycle of the “Calling of Saint Matthew” in the chapel of the church of St- Louis-of-the-French in Rome.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It’s a journey into antiquity with glamorous historians Suzannah Lipscomb and Kate Williams. Paired with experts David Harper and Catherine Southon they Road Trip from Bletchley in Buckinghamshire to an auction in London. There’s also opportunity to hear how Mrs Beeton became the first ‘domestic Goddess’ and why Luton played a critical role in the fashion world when hats were de rigueur daily wear. David and Suzannah gamble on a giant ant while Catherine and Kate plump for a very large tea urn.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: C’est dans le centre de Buenos Aires qu’Eduardo Stupia a decide d’installer son atelier entièrement dedie à la creation. Dans une maison du XXe siècle, coince entre deux immeubles modernes, il occupe un large espace dans lequel il peut se livrer à son art de predilection, le dessin. Ses œuvres, qu’il decrit lui-meme comme des paysages abstraits, sont tracees au crayon, au fusain, ou à l’encre de Chine. Dans ses compositions heteroclites, où le langage graphique et la precision du geste tiennent une place centrale, Eduardo Stupia explore la semantique du dessin et ouvre le champ de l’imagination.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Prussian painter, Caspar David Friedrich. You will discover his labour with The Wanderer above the mists, Greifswald port or the Lone tree.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Spanish painter, Francisco de Goya. You will discover his labour with Lunch in the Countryside, The third of may 1808 or the Cannibals.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: L’histoire de la mort et de la resurrection du Christ domine la culture occidentale depuis 2000 ans. C’est probablement l’un des evenements les plus marquants de l’histoire, que l’on retrouve dans les Évangiles aussi bien que dans les tableaux des plus grands artistes. Ce long metrage explore l’histoire de Pâques dans l’art, depuis l’epoque des premiers chretiens jusqu’à nos jours. Tourne à Jerusalem, aux Etats-Unis et en Europe, le film explore les differentes representations de Pâques à travers les âges et nous dresse ainsi un portrait de notre histoire commune.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Le musee d’Orsay, qui fut dabord une gare construite pour lExposition universelle de 1900, abrite la production artistique du monde occidental sur la periode de 1848 à 1914. De nombreux courants artistiques y sont presentes : academisme, realisme, symbolisme, Art nouveau, et bien sur l’impressionnisme avec des œuvres et des artistes incontournables tels que l’Olympia de Manet, le Bal du moulin de la galette de Renoir, l’Etoile de Degas ou le Cirque de Seurat.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Little Sketches
programme.desc: In 64 fun episodes, Gia-Haï Phan teaches you all the sketching techniques you need.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Construite à l’aube du 20ème siècle, l’École d’Art de Glasgow est l’œuvre majeure du seul artiste britannique considere comme precurseur de la modernite, Charles Rennie Mackintosh. Representant le plus eminent du "Style de Glasgow

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Leonard à la National Gallery de Londres
programme.desc: Un evenement remarquable sest produit à la National Gallery de Londres lorsque la plus grande collection jamais constituee de peintures de Leonard de Vinci a ete reunie dans une exposition unique : Leonard de Vinci : peintre à la cour de Milan. Leonard est reconnu comme etant peut-etre le plus grand peintre et sculpteur de tous les temps, mais ses talents ne sarretaient pas là. Ce film raconte sa vie et setend sur Leonard le visionnaire, Leonard linventeur. Depuis lendroit où il a vecu ses dernières annees au Château du Clos Luce en France, nous verrons que Leonard de Vinci etait peut-etre lincarnation meme de lesprit de la Renaissance.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Le curieux monde de Hieronymus Bosch
programme.desc: La ville natale de Bosch aux Pays-Bas ne possède pas de tableaux du peintre et pourtant, pour la grande exposition « Visions of Genius » qui a eu lieu à l’anniversaire de sa mort en 2016, le musee Noordbrabants a reussi à reunir la presque totalite des tableaux et dessins de Bosch. C’est en 2008 que le directeur du musee a commence sa tournee dans les plus grands musees d’Europe et Etats-Unis pour en persuader les directeurs de preter au musee Noordbrabants leurs œuvres, en echange d’un travail d’analyse et de recherche sur les tableaux en pret. Ainsi « Hieronymus Bosch. Visions of Genius » a ete l’exposition la plus ambitieuse dediee au peintre hollandais. Ce documentaire sera une plongee dans l’univers etrange et visionnaire de Hieronymus Bosch.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « J’envie les Japonais », ecrivait Van Gogh à son frère, Theo. Grâce à l’exposition sur laquelle est base ce film, « Van Gogh et le Japon », au musee Van Gogh d’Amsterdam, on comprend pourquoi. Bien que Vincent van Gogh n’ait jamais visite le Japon, il reste le pays qui a eu le plus d’influence sur lui et son œuvre. En se rendant dans les galeries d’art japonais à Paris et en creant sa propre image du Japon après des recherches approfondies, des collections d’estampes et de longues discussions avec d’autres artistes, la decouverte des œuvres japonaises entraîna la carrière de Van Gogh dans une nouvelle direction très excitante.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Discover or re-discover the masterpieces of the greatest painters of history through our documentary series Within The Frame. From impressionists to surrealists, from Leonard Da Vinci to Paul Cezanne, every episode will immerge you into a virtual tour of a paintings collection. You will see the most impressive paintings ever made and wont miss a single detail.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Michelangelo Merisi (1571-1610), born in Caravaggio, is known as a wicked artist who had to flee Rome in 1606 after killing a man. But Caravaggio is above all a painter who changed the face of painting at the very beginning of the 17th century. Notice his use of colour in the people emerging from a dark background, like his “Bacchus” or “David”. One of his masterpieces is the cycle of the “Calling of Saint Matthew” in the chapel of the church of St- Louis-of-the-French in Rome.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedy legend Jennifer Saunders and best pal, top actress Patricia Potter take to the road on a humdinger of a trip. Joined by veteran antiquers Phillip Serrell and Mark Stacey they shop in Berkshire, Hampshire and Oxfordshire before heading for an auction in Greenwich, London. Jennifer and Phil detour to hear about Fred Karno, the man credited with inventing slapstick comedy. While Patricia and Mark learn how a surgeon from Reading used his incredible sense of smell to successfully treat soldiers injured in World War One.And, Phil gets custard pied – what’s not to love?

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Les impressionnistes - et lhomme qui les a crees
programme.desc: Ce sont les artistes les plus populaires du monde. Les œuvres de Cezanne, Monet, Degas et leurs compatriotes representent des richesses inestimables. Mais qui etaient-ils vraiment ? Comment et pourquoi ont-ils revolutionne l’histoire de l’art ? Qu’est-ce qui se cache derrière leur succès intemporel ? Pour repondre à ces questions, le documentaire a obtenu un accès unique à une grande exposition mettant l’accent sur le collectionneur d’art parisien du 19ème siècle, Paul Durand-Ruel, l’expert des Impressionnistes qui prit la decision courageuse d’exposer les Impressionnistes à New York en 1886 et ainsi introduire la societe americaine à la peinture française moderne.

programme.title: Manet - Degas, a troubled friendship
programme.desc: In 1917 the art world is ablaze: the famous painter and sculptor Edgar Degas has just died, leaving behind him a collection rich of dozens of works from Edouard Manet.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En 2013, la Norvège celebra le 150e anniversaire de la naissance dEdvard Munch (1863-1944), lune des figures proeminentes de lart moderne. Munch 150, coproduite par le Musee national et le Musee Munch, est dejà acclamee comme « lexposition dune vie ». Linteret general est enorme, comme le temoigne le resultat record de la mise aux enchères publiques de lun de ses quatre tableaux, Le Cri, soit 120 millions de dollars. Cette presentation vous amènera dans les coulisses de la mise en place de cette exposition, en plus de comprendre une visite guidee de la Norvège qui brossera la biographie de cet homme dont la vie sest etalee de la moitie du 19ème siècle jusquà loccupation allemande lors de la Seconde Guerre mondiale.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux amies de la scène et de la television, Ruth Madoc et Su Pollard, connues pour leurs apparitions dans la sitcom Hi-De-Hi, partent à la chasse aux antiquites avec Phil Serrell et Raj Bisram. Partis de Monmouth, ville frontalière du Pays de Galles, ils se rendent à Congleton, dans le Cheshire, pour une vente aux enchères.Ruth decouvre egalement lincroyable infirmière du XIXe siècle - et ce nest pas Florence Nightingale - tandis que Su visite lancienne ville romaine de Caerleon et trouve le temps daffronter Phil dans un amphitheâtre.Et Su tente de resoudre un vieux mystère... Phil porte-t-il une perruque ?

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Bernard Matussière, fashion and art photographer. He has photographed the biggest stars and made memorable advertising campaigns that have marked a generation. He started photography at a very young age, and today he will tell us what made him become a photographer, his life, his career.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: The Azay-le-Rideau Castle is nestled at the core of the old city and surrounded by a romantic park, the castle seems to be built on water. This intimate, almost hidden edifice is endowed with an ageless charm and a powerful bond with history. Today, it is renowned as one of the most representative works of the period, revealing a whole new conception of architecture and life. It was indeed a place meant to house knowledgeable ladies of the time. Today, this Renaissance treasure counts more than 300 000 visitors a year and represents a considerable economic asset for the city. It is also the combination of expertise, skills, character and devotion of its caretakers which animates this splendid castle with a historic soul.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: Construit au XVIème siècle, par Jean le Breton, le château de Villandry a beneficie de l’experience des bâtisseurs de la Renaissance car il est le dernier des grands châteaux de la Loire edifie à cette periode. Sa sublime architecture intimiste, lui confère une humanite toute particulière, c’est un lieu où l’on ressent immediatement le privilège du bonheur d’etre là. Dotes d’un ingenieux système d’irrigation, les six jardins de Villandry forment une vaste mosaïque multicolore qui est au cœur d’une activite intense, eclectique et coherente. Il en va de meme pour les interieurs du château, le proprietaire s’etant modestement retire dans une aile construite à la periode classique, il a laisse toutes les pièces Renaissance du château, mobilier et collection de peintures espagnoles compris, au plaisir de l’admiration des visiteurs...

programme.title: China - Masters of the Arts
programme.sub-title: Che Peng-Fei - The Painter of Poetry
programme.desc: Che Peng Fei sublimates traditional Chinese painting by charging it with a unique poetic sensibility. His art, inspired by nature and philosophy, evokes a rich, contemplative inner world.

programme.title: Museum Tour
programme.sub-title: La Closerie Falbala - Dans l’oeil de Jean Dubuffet
programme.desc: Museum Tour is a series that invites the viewer to discover unique which, for the artists chosen, have been incubators of creativity and a source of inspiration. Under their patronage, some of those sites have been turned into museums or foundations where their memory and work have picked up a life of their own.Each of the episodes will tell the story uniting the artist with a particular place, seeking intimacy in the process.This show’s agenda is decidedly visual. Works of art and the places in which they’re set will be filmed in such a way as to arouse strong emotions, thus placing the viewer in the spot, as if they were present in the flesh. This angle for the spectacular and search for beauty will enhance the accessibility of the series for an uninformed audience.A family-friendly documentary series which, beyond the fascinating information provided, offers a sight, sound and emotional journey into a captivating, palpable and contemporary form.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Leonard de Vinci est l’un des artistes les plus adules au monde. De nombreux films et series documentaires se sont interesses à son genie hors du commun, sans pour autant preter attention à ce qu’il y a de plus parlant : son art. Les tableaux et dessins incomparables de Leonard de Vinci seront au centre de notre film et Exhibition on screen vous presentera la totalite des tableaux qui lui sont attribues. Marquant les 500 ans de la mort de ce genie, ce documentaire est une reference sur Leonard de Vinci, le premier à raconter son histoire dans sa globalite.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Canaletto and the Art of Venice
programme.desc: Canaletto et l’art de Venise, un voyage en immersion dans la vie et l’art du celèbre peintre de Venise. Aucun artiste n’a su mieux capturer l’essence et le charme de cette ville que Giovanni Antonio Canal, plus connu sous le nom de Canaletto. La remarquable collection regroupe plus de 200 tableaux, dessins et eaux-fortes nous permet de partir à la decouverte du talent artistique de Canaletto, de ses contemporains et de la ville qu’il a su reproduire avec genie. Le film ouvre egalement les portes de deux residences royales officielles, Buckingham Palace et le château de Windsor, pour nous en apprendre plus sur l’artiste et sur Joseph Smith, l’homme qui a fait decouvrir Canaletto à la Grande-Bretagne.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Paolo Veronese (1528 - 1588) is known as a great colourist and for his trompe-lœil frescoes and oil paintings.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Lucas Cranach l’Ancien (v. 1472-1553) est un artiste majeur de la Renaissance germanique, actif à Wittenberg dans la première moitie du XVIe s. Peintre officiel de Frederic le Sage, prince electeur de Saxe, il est proche du reformateur Martin Luther. Au-delà des thèmes bibliques, il s’interesse particulièrement à la representation du nu feminin, comme dans l’Adam et Eve de Besançon ou les fameuses Trois Grâces, recemment acquises par le musee du Louvre grâce à un appel aux dons.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two favourite Blue Peter presenters Sarah Greene and Peter Duncan are in the company of Natasha Raskin and Catherine Southon as they hunt for antiques around Surrey, Hertfordshire and North West London. Peter detours to learn how hockey became a popular sport the world over while keen aviator Sarah sees how the Battle of Britain was won. An incredible haul of antiques, including chimney pots, Pinocchio and a pair of African fertility figures, go under the gavel at an auction in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rockn roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Gregoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous nous rendons dans la banlieue Sud de Paris. C’est dans un quartier tranquille que l’artiste Elias Crespin se rend chaque matin pour rejoindre son studio. L’artiste d’origine venezuelienne, y a etabli ses quartiers depuis près de 5 ans et y façonnent ses creations un peu particulières. Ses sculptures sont composees de figures geometriques simples, des lignes, triangles, carres ou cercles, qui flottent dans l’espace suspendus à des fils presque invisibles.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Flemish painter, Pierre Paul Rubens. You will discover his labour with Samson and Dalilah, The four philosophers or The education of Marie de’Medici.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Always self-confident, this 40-year-old father is an unrivalled handyman. However, for this resident of Barvaux, decorating hasnt always been his first passion. Today, our decorating enthusiast has found his own style. He prefers raw materials and natural elements. This week’s theme suits him like a glove. Geoffrey has every intention of winning this weeks competition and becoming the ace decorator. And to win, hes going to have to convince Laetitia.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Its the long-awaited day of the grand final. But before seeing the reaction of the owners and finding out their scores, each candidate will find out what the other contestants thought of their choice in terms of decoration. And its Armand who will be the first to join our decorating expert, Valerie Damidot, in the workshop. Armand is about to discover the criticisms of his opponents. We hope for his sake that his heart is in the right place.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: The Blue Zones of Longevity
programme.desc: On enregistre aujourd’hui plus de 900 personnes de plus de 90 ans dans la peninsule de Nicoya au Costa Rica. Comment cela est-il possible ? Leur credo, la « pura vida », que l’on traduirait par « profiter des richesses qu’offre la vie », l’ascendance genetique amerindienne, une alimentation nutritive et etonnamment sucree, une vivacite physique et intellectuelle favorisee par l’environnement peu mecanise, des liens relationnels très forts… voilà qui semblent etre les reponses à leur longevite. Notre chef naturopathe et notre medecin traitant enqueteront pour decouvrir les secrets des habitants en allant à leur rencontre, avec l’aide de scientifiques.

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... Youre on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Beautiful landscapes
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: Strengthen and detoxify with this powerful and challenging sequence. Unravel to Reveal is a process of exploring the gift of presence in order to find what gifts the body can reveal. Be with your breath and let the process unfold.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to a thighs-abs-glutes workout, focusing on effectiveness and intensity. Guillaume and Sabrina introduce exercises that quickly engage the quadriceps, with movements to intensify the muscle work. The buildup of lactic acid in the muscles is expected but is part of the strengthening process. Variations throughout the session help maintain constant effort and target different areas. Get ready for a dynamic and challenging workout to tone the lower body.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: With an intense focus on the breath, Warrior Wisdom creates a moment of presence that is attentive, aware and complete. Moving slowly with the breath allows a deeper connection of mind and body that will leave you with greater confidence and strength.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: On this third day of competition, Gil takes to the stage. At just 23, this Brussels native is the youngest decorator of the week. But make no mistake, behind this pretty face lies a formidable adversary. A recent graduate in interior architecture, our decorator draws his inspiration from the outdoors. A young man with no shortage of creativity and, above all, style. Lets hope that his definition of style is suitable for children, because this week its a playroom that Gil will have to redecorate on the theme of "well in ones bubble

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Cap au Nord pour decouvrir une ville française absolument incontournable : Lille. Cette ville possède un patrimoine architectural exceptionnel, marchande dès le Moyen Age, citadelle sous Louis XIV, industrielle au XIXe...elle sagrandit au cours des siècles. Julie ira à la rencontre de ceux qui participent à la renommee de la ville et de la region, et à travers son patrimoine culinaire avec au menu de ce voyage : la recette du coq à la bière, celle du hochepot, et sur une note sucree, une crème brûlee à la chicoree. .

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is in the heart of the Sarthe that Julie begins her new tour. Located in the Pays de la Loire region, the Sarthe department is the gateway to the French Grand Ouest. In the Haut Maine region, Le Mans is a city of art as well as a historic city, which played a decisive role in the development of the automobile. The country of Le Mans is distinguished by the diversity of its heritage, having kept in its stones the imprints of all eras. This region is notably renowned for its poulet de Loue, its capon and many other regional specialities. Lets go for a real Sarthe gourmet journey, with veal rouelles à la mancelle, roast poularde and seasonal fruit tart.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is a mushroom that we are going to focus on today. A mushroom, or a black diamond, some would say: the truffle.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourd’hui, les plus gourmands ne devraient pas etre deçus puisque c’est le chocolat qui est mis à l’honneur. Decouvert par les mayas il y 2500 ans et plus largement ensuite par les Aztèques, le chocolat fait partie aujourd’hui des produits preferes des français. Et qu’on ne s’y trompe pas : au meme titre que la cuisine a ses grands chef, le chocolat a aussi ses grands chocolatiers. Cote recettes, Julie fera decouvrir un gâteau qu’on ne fait qu’à Saint Émilien et qui associe le chocolat au macaron, avant de rejoindre le Pays Basque pour un dessert qui ne manque pas de piment. Nous grimperons ensuite en montagne à la rencontre d’une cuisinière d’origine suisse qui fait des pains au chocolat à sa façon. Enfin, vous verrez que le chocolat nous reserve de nombreuses surprises : il possède de nombreuses vertus et s’utilise aussi pour le bien etre.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo met lavocat à lhonneur, ce fruit originaire du Mexique qui presente de nombreux bienfaits pour notre sante. Elle nous propose une recette de gambas à la puree de concombres et avocats, ainsi quune panna cotta à lavocat accompagnee de sa salade de fraises.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Les aperos improvises, ce n’est pas toujours facile. Quand les amis debarquent sans prevenir, le stress peut vite monter. Pas de panique, Luana Belmondo et Thomas Clouet, grand specialiste en la matière, improvisent un apero au pied leve avec trois fois rien. Des macarons de champignons, un mini tartare de bœuf, et le tour est joue !

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: We end up at Yellowstone National Park in the United States, it is located in the first natural park created in the world. In Peru, the Amazon rainforest is suffering from massive deforestation. The desert on Beijings doorstep is regularly hit by sandstorms. Some experts predict that the Chinese capital could be threatened by deserts within a hundred years. In Montana, American agricultural productivity has an ecological and human cost. Engineer Marc Dufumier explains how mechanisation is undermining the natural balance. In Brazil, agrofuels have made it possible to reduce dependence on oil, cut urban air pollution and even limit greenhouse gas emissions. In Los Angeles, human activities have disrupted the greenhouse effect and exacerbated it. Today, the Earth is heating up.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" is dedicated to a thighs-abs-glutes workout, focusing on effectiveness and intensity. Guillaume and Sabrina introduce exercises that quickly engage the quadriceps, with movements to intensify the muscle work. The buildup of lactic acid in the muscles is expected but is part of the strengthening process. Variations throughout the session help maintain constant effort and target different areas. Get ready for a dynamic and challenging workout to tone the lower body.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.desc: Strengthen and detoxify with this powerful and challenging sequence. Unravel to Reveal is a process of exploring the gift of presence in order to find what gifts the body can reveal. Be with your breath and let the process unfold.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrenees Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte dAzur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While were all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes you on a bread trail to uncover the dedicated artisan bakers and millers. Her adventure will lead her through the Libourne region, then onwards to the North of France, the Ardèche, and the Aisne, where bakers have transformed bread into a powerful catalyst for social cohesion. While some individuals may avoid bread, particularly due to gluten-related concerns, others have chosen to reposition it at the forefront of the dining experience by championing its nutritional benefits. This commitment is shared by several chefs whom Julie will meet at the conclusion of her expedition.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Wellness cuisine is not synonymous with sadness and insipidity. It can be extremely gourmet, for a balanced way to indulge yourself. On this theme, Luana welcomes young wellness pastry chef Johanna Le Pape. Together, they will prepare recipes that are both tasty and perfectly balanced: corn pizza with vegetables and peach-cassis and verbena puffs...

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Leftovers often end up in the garbage can. But with a little thought, its easy to recycle them. This ecological and economical gesture can even delight our taste buds. Like us, Luana Belmondo hates throwing things away. She knows all about waste-free cooking and has mastered the art. She shows us how to reinvent boiled or steamed potatoes as something other than mashed potatoes. On the program: potato souffle with paprika and vegetable gratin with curry.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Its off to the start of the first week of competition. But before the four amateur decorators take their turn with paintbrushes and nails, they have a meeting in the Brussels workshop. To kick off this weeks competition, Armand, 33, is in the starting blocks. This young man from Montpellier is determined to prove that he is the ace decorator and no one else. Our competitor has the advantage of having a good dose of inspiration. And yes, as well as creating costumes, Armand has several great passions. This weeks theme is wood. Will our man from Montpellier succeed in keeping to this theme, which is full of pitfalls?

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: This week’s heat sees a pair of established designers taking on a less experienced up and coming pair, as they’re challenged to deliver amazing spaces on a budget of £5000, for a community park in Norris Green, Liverpool. Friends Sue Spout and Dean Bolton-Grant from Harrogate in Yorkshire both own their own garden businesses and between them have decades of experience and include royalty amongst the people they’ve worked for. Despite living opposite sides of the country Tamara Bridge and Kate Savill have collaborated on a number of show gardens since winning medals for young garden designer of the year. Faced with designing gardens for an open public area that has in the past been neglected and suffered from vandalism what type of gardens will the designers create? And who will be victorious?

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today its Pupas turn. This 29-year-old from Liège has been immersed in the art world since she was a child. But beneath her calm, smiling exterior, Pupa has quite a character. And when it comes to decorating, you dont have to look for her. This week, Pupa, like her rivals, will have to spend €1,000 redecorating a parents bedroom on the theme of wood. So is Pupa happy?

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: On the third day of the competition, its Magdalenas turn to try and prove that shes the ace of the interior design world. At 42, this Montoise native of Polish origin is the mother of two children and an artistic director. This time, shell have to move on from layout to practical application. Magdalena will have to completely redecorate an adult bedroom. Great news, because this weeks theme is wood. But the first she’ll have to convince Joëlle the owner, who knows exactly what she wants for her room.

programme.title: The Blue Zones of Longevity
programme.desc: A Ikaria, petite île grecque isolee de la mer Egee, plus d’un tiers des habitants a passe le cap des 90 ans. Ici, les grecs ont construit leurs propres resistances au temps qui passe. Quelles sont leurs specificites ? Du regime mediterraneen, à l’activite sexuelle particulièrement active des Ikariotes, en passant par la radioactivite moderee de l’île, sans oublier l’activite physique douce et la vie en communaute… Une chef naturopathe et un medecin generaliste decèleront les secrets de cette île grâce à des rencontres avec ses habitants et les meilleurs scientifiques.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Always self-confident, this 40-year-old father is an unrivalled handyman. However, for this resident of Barvaux, decorating hasnt always been his first passion. Today, our decorating enthusiast has found his own style. He prefers raw materials and natural elements. This week’s theme suits him like a glove. Geoffrey has every intention of winning this weeks competition and becoming the ace decorator. And to win, hes going to have to convince Laetitia.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Its the long-awaited day of the grand final. But before seeing the reaction of the owners and finding out their scores, each candidate will find out what the other contestants thought of their choice in terms of decoration. And its Armand who will be the first to join our decorating expert, Valerie Damidot, in the workshop. Armand is about to discover the criticisms of his opponents. We hope for his sake that his heart is in the right place.

programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: The Blue Zones of Longevity
programme.desc: On enregistre aujourd’hui plus de 900 personnes de plus de 90 ans dans la peninsule de Nicoya au Costa Rica. Comment cela est-il possible ? Leur credo, la « pura vida », que l’on traduirait par « profiter des richesses qu’offre la vie », l’ascendance genetique amerindienne, une alimentation nutritive et etonnamment sucree, une vivacite physique et intellectuelle favorisee par l’environnement peu mecanise, des liens relationnels très forts… voilà qui semblent etre les reponses à leur longevite. Notre chef naturopathe et notre medecin traitant enqueteront pour decouvrir les secrets des habitants en allant à leur rencontre, avec l’aide de scientifiques.

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... Youre on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Beautiful landscapes
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Expand and Empower: Open Your Chest, Shoulders and Hips
programme.desc: Alignment isnt merely a physical expression. What we express is not always a window to what dwells within. Enjoy this strengthening sequence while taking the opportunity provided by the Expand and Empower practice to observe your alignment.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" offers a multi-sport session that combines several disciplines, such as boxing, hockey, and football. Guillaume and Sabrina invite participants to move actively, making the workout both fun and intense. The mix of sports helps work multiple muscle groups while keeping the session enjoyable. It’s a complete and interactive workout, perfect for getting active while having fun.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Release and Restore: A Sequence for Your Spine
programme.desc: Release and Restore is a sequence that brings you full circle through a series of poses that create space for reflection. You will release tension in your spine while attuning to the changes even the smallest actions create. What change will you make today?

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Its 32-year-old Nadèges turn to roll up her sleeves. Originally from Soignies, shes a keen decorator with a style of her own. As youll have gathered, our competitor likes everything to be modern and no-frills. But dont be fooled by appearances. Behind this little lady lies an expert in building, roofing and masonry. A skill with which she intends to make her mark.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpente le pays de Blaye, visite deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arreter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour decouvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelee « Cite du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour decouvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus recents de cette ville chargee d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: We are in the middle of the harvest season, a perfect opportunity to discover the most beautiful French vineyards.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Tendre et savoureux, l’agneau tient une place preponderante dans la cuisine festive mais aussi dans celle de tous les jours. Du Pays Basque au Cotentin en passant par Paris, Julie part donc sur les routes de France à la decouverte des differentes races et types delevage existant à travers le pays. Il faut dire que la France a lune des productions les plus variees au monde. Il existe plus dune quarantaine de races repertoriees en 5 categories : precoces, d’herbage, rustiques, merinos et laitières. Mais plus qu’à la race, c’est à la façon dont ils sont alimentes qui interesse les fins connaisseurs. Julie nous fait decouvrir ses producteurs et cuisiniers de ce met raffine !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C’est à nouveau sur les routes de France que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Julie pour parler d’un produit incontournable des tables françaises : le fromage. Plus qu’un engouement gourmand, plus qu’une friandise de fins de repas, le fromage est associe à l’image de la gastronomie française, et d’ailleurs reconnu patrimoine immateriel par l’UNESCO. Les français ne s’y sont pas trompes : avec près de 1 000 varietes - des pâtes molles, aux pâtes cuites, persillees, ou encore pressees, et avec 45 Appellations, nous sommes les plus gros consommateurs de fromage au monde !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Lets hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. Well visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Wellness cuisine is not synonymous with sadness and insipidity. It can be extremely gourmet, for a balanced way to indulge yourself. On this theme, Luana welcomes young wellness pastry chef Johanna Le Pape. Together, they will prepare recipes that are both tasty and perfectly balanced: corn pizza with vegetables and peach-cassis and verbena puffs...

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Leftovers often end up in the garbage can. But with a little thought, its easy to recycle them. This ecological and economical gesture can even delight our taste buds. Like us, Luana Belmondo hates throwing things away. She knows all about waste-free cooking and has mastered the art. She shows us how to reinvent boiled or steamed potatoes as something other than mashed potatoes. On the program: potato souffle with paprika and vegetable gratin with curry.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: In Florida, the Everglades swamp is being restored at great expense. 15 billion dollars are being invested over thirty years to save the water supply of the entire region. In California, on the crests of the Tehachapi hills, the worlds largest wind farm is being discovered. In China, the fermentation of excrement produces gas, mainly methane, which, when burned, is transformed into energy called biogas. In California, the Taft oil field was discovered, one of the largest in the world: nearly 10,000 wells on over 52,000 hectares. Then Haiti fights to save itself from deforestation. In Utah, Salt Lake City is a good example of how we live today: there are 37 cities in the world with more than 8 million inhabitants. In the Eure-et-Loir region of France, they decided to build the ideal house to give a house that saves 85% of energy.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: This episode of "Home Training" offers a multi-sport session that combines several disciplines, such as boxing, hockey, and football. Guillaume and Sabrina invite participants to move actively, making the workout both fun and intense. The mix of sports helps work multiple muscle groups while keeping the session enjoyable. It’s a complete and interactive workout, perfect for getting active while having fun.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Expand and Empower: Open Your Chest, Shoulders and Hips
programme.desc: Alignment isnt merely a physical expression. What we express is not always a window to what dwells within. Enjoy this strengthening sequence while taking the opportunity provided by the Expand and Empower practice to observe your alignment.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If youre a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brevonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, well explore the Libournais region, where well uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, well arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: A good breakfast is a healthy, balanced meal made up of 5 energy-giving elements: protein, fiber, carbohydrates, healthy fats and hydration. Luana Belmondo offers us a healthy breakfast that will satisfy both salty and sweet palates: oatmeal, avocado and salmon, buddha bowl with chia seeds and seasonal fruit, and vegan panacakes.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her Italian friend Alessandra Pierini are preparing a pasta party. Theyll be cooking pesto and sharing their tips on how to get it right. Theyll also be making pasta saporita, full of color and flavor!

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: In this week’s episode, professional garden design partners Jon Smith and Adam Woolcott take on Catherine and James Burrage from Yorkshire. Their challenge is to deliver amazing garden spaces on a budget of £5000 for the Knightswood Day Care Centre in the heart of the Essex countryside within sniffing distance of the North Sea. The centre offers a lifeline to mainly elderly local people who have physical or mental disabilities or who live alone. With a brief from the centre that includes sensory elements, seating and a potting shed, both teams have ambitious designs but can they complete them in just 2 days?

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In a tranquil mountain monastery, Chef-Monk Jeong Kwan invites us into her world of mindful, intentional cooking. Her approach to food is rooted in simplicity, compassion, and a deep respect for nature. Together, we pick vegetables from the temple garden and learn why plant-based, seasonal eating has been central to Korean temple cuisine for generations.A highlight of the episode is learning the art of fermentation—from soy sauce aged in clay pots to rich, umami-packed bean pastes that require months or years to mature. Jeong Kwan explains that fermentation mirrors the human journey: slow, patient, and transformative.Cooking with her becomes a meditation, revealing that food prepared with intention nourishes not only the body but the spirit. This episode challenges us to rethink our relationship with ingredients, time, and the act of eating itself.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: This week’s heat sees a pair of established designers taking on a less experienced up and coming pair, as they’re challenged to deliver amazing spaces on a budget of £5000, for a community park in Norris Green, Liverpool. Friends Sue Spout and Dean Bolton-Grant from Harrogate in Yorkshire both own their own garden businesses and between them have decades of experience and include royalty amongst the people they’ve worked for. Despite living opposite sides of the country Tamara Bridge and Kate Savill have collaborated on a number of show gardens since winning medals for young garden designer of the year. Faced with designing gardens for an open public area that has in the past been neglected and suffered from vandalism what type of gardens will the designers create? And who will be victorious?

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Our season begins in Guatemala with an ascent up the mighty Fuego Volcano, one of the most active volcanoes in the world. As we climb through loose ash and steep ridges, the powerful rumble beneath our feet reveals the dynamic relationship between humans and the natural forces that shape our planet. The climb becomes both a physical challenge and a reminder of the deep connection between environment and well-being.After the volcano, we descend into the world of ancient healing with a traditional Temazcal lodge, where Mayan practitioners guide us through a powerful cleansing ritual using steam, herbs, and ceremony. Inside the dark, humid chamber, the experience becomes a profound demonstration of how culture, community, and spirituality intersect with health.Our journey continues at a coffee plantation, where we learn how altitude, soil, and sustainable farming practices impact not only flavour, but also community health and economic stability. By the end of the episode, we reconnect.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In this inspiring episode, we join Team Broken Earth on a medical mission in Guatemala, witnessing firsthand the life-changing work taking place in local hospitals. From dawn until night, Canadian and Guatemalan healthcare teams perform surgeries, consult patients, and provide care that is often out of reach for many families.We meet patients of all ages—children awaiting orthopedic procedures, adults seeking mobility restoration, elders who have endured years of pain. Their stories highlight the profound need for global medical partnerships and the impact compassionate care can have on entire communities.Inside the operating rooms, surgical teams work with extraordinary precision, focus, and teamwork. Outside, families wait with hope and gratitude. This episode is a tribute to the power of service, cultural exchange, and the shared humanity that defines global health. Helping others, we learn, is one of the most powerful forms of healing.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: New Zealand - The Blue Mind Part II
programme.desc: Were still in New Zealand, where we look at the scientific and emotional benefits of water, illustrated by therapeutic surfing experiences and the Maori peoples ancestral connection with aquatic environments. From mental well-being to physical health, we discover how New Zealands abundant waters are more than just a natural spectacle; theyre a source of holistic health and well-being.

programme.title: The Blue Zones of Longevity
programme.desc: A Ikaria, petite île grecque isolee de la mer Egee, plus d’un tiers des habitants a passe le cap des 90 ans. Ici, les grecs ont construit leurs propres resistances au temps qui passe. Quelles sont leurs specificites ? Du regime mediterraneen, à l’activite sexuelle particulièrement active des Ikariotes, en passant par la radioactivite moderee de l’île, sans oublier l’activite physique douce et la vie en communaute… Une chef naturopathe et un medecin generaliste decèleront les secrets de cette île grâce à des rencontres avec ses habitants et les meilleurs scientifiques.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: India - The Search for Mindfulness Part I
programme.desc: We journey to India, a land revered for its ancient spiritual wisdom and practices. From the tranquil valleys of Kullu Manali in the Himalayas to the vibrant, bustling streets of Delhi, we explore the multifaceted world of mindfulness, meditation, and yoga. As we navigate through contrasting environments, we discover how meditation is part of daily life, offering invaluable lessons about finding inner tranquility amid external chaos. We also delve into the transformative impact of mindfulness on underprivileged children, highlighting how these ancient practices empower young lives. Rooted in Indias rich cultural heritage, the episode reveals how the nations spiritual traditions provide both sanctuary and a deeper connection to ourselves and the broader world. Join us for this enlightening expedition as we unravel the power of mindfulness and how we can incorporate it into our daily lives no matter where we live.

programme.title: My Zen People
programme.desc: They are beautiful sisters, they are passionate about nature and they have a very strong common point: entrepreneurship. After years of evolution in consumer sectors, discover Annabelle and Valerie who knew how to listen to their passion to create a fitness and surf club (for Annabelle) and a zero waste grocery store (for Valerie).

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Ghost Elephants
programme.desc: Legenden sier at “spøkelseselefanter” skjuler seg i Angolas høyland, og aldri har blitt sett av mennesker. Den kritikerroste regissøren Werner Herzog (“Grizzly Man”) følger en episk reise til det angolske høylandet ledet av National Geographic Explorer og konserveringsbiolog Dr. Steve Boyes for å finne disse majestetiske og sky dyrene.

programme.title: Nesten menneske: En elefants liv
programme.desc: I møte med brann, matmangel og rovdyr står tre elefantfamilier overfor utfordringer som nesten virker menneskelige. Dokumentaren følger elefantflokker som bruker nedarvet kunnskap under den lange vandringen etter mat og sikkerhet i Kenya, India og Mali. Vi ser nærmere på elefantenes sinn; deres unike evner til kommunikasjon, opplæring og medfølelse gjør dem i stand til å overleve under ekstreme forhold. Men trass i de majestetiske dyrenes styrke og intelligens, reduseres antall dyr i stort tempo.

programme.title: De ultimate rovdyrene
programme.desc: Flere mennesker blir lemlestet etter haiangrep ved kysten av Brasil. Sibirske tigre tar menneskeblod, men de angriper ikke på grunn av sult. Og badende i Florida må passe seg for krokodillene som spiser hva som helst. En park i Ontario har kanskje verdens fineste campingplass, der svartbjørnene leder velkomstkomiteen.

programme.title: Rovdyrenes hemmelige liv
programme.desc: Elvene og havene er som slagmarker der selv de største og farligste rovdyrene får testet hvor modige de er.

programme.title: Rovdyrenes hemmelige liv
programme.desc: Opplev steder der engene, tundraen og isen strekker seg så langt øyet kan se. Uten trær som kan dempe vinden blir det ekstremt lave temperaturer.

programme.title: Secrets of the Elephants
programme.desc: Regnskogen i Kongo er hjemstedet til en av verdens mest unnvikende arter, den afrikanske skogselefanten. Alt ved dem – kroppene deres, atferden deres, familiene deres – er tilpasset livet i regnskogen. Men å overleve her betyr mer enn bare å tilpasse seg. Disse elefantene har formet skogen rundt seg etter sine behov, og har på den måten skapt et habitat ulikt noe annet på jorden.

programme.title: Hvitulvens rike
programme.desc: Vinteren nærmer seg og flokken starter jakten, men en mystisk forsvinning byr på en stor utfordring.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Phil Breslin drar dypt inn i Australias mangroveskog, og leter etter utrolige dyr som nyter sumplivet. Han vasser gjennom gjørme, og møter en hissig mangrovekrabbe med livsfarlige klør før han fanger en shovel-nosed ray med bare hendene. Phil har hele tiden følge av verdens mest forhatte skapning – myggen.

programme.title: Race to Winter
programme.desc: Når vårens første lys glir over fjordene, skogene, fjellene og tundraen, starter den store oppvåkningen. Brunbjørnmødrene kommer ut av vinterdvalen, og leder ungene sine ut i en helt ny verden. Lundefuglene gjenforenes med sine livspartnere, og isbjørnene vandrer rundt på den smeltende isen. Men de har lite tid - skyggen av vinteren lurer. Og I dette uendelige løpet mot kulden er det kun de mest motstandsdyktige som klarer seg.

programme.title: Ultimate Animals: Høydepunkter
programme.desc: En elefant er sterk nok til å skyve en lastebil, en orangutang har syv menns styrke, og de er begge svært intelligente.

programme.title: Ultimate Animals: Høydepunkter
programme.desc: Griser kan fange opp lukt fra ting som er begravd to etasjer under bakken. En hundenese kan sende deg i fengsel.

programme.title: Croc Wars: Grumeti Vs Mara
programme.desc: Hvert år krysser nesten to millioner gnuer og sebraer Serengetis to elver, Grumeti og Mara. Her venter dynastier av nilkrokodiller på sitt årlige etegilde. Men i krokodillenes verden er ikke alle drapsstrategier de samme. Fra brutale bakholdsangrep til frekke tyverier – disse smarte rovdyrene benytter seg av helt ulike taktikker under den viktige jakten på ett måltid i to elver.

programme.title: Most Wanted Sharks
programme.desc: Det finnes millioner av haier i verdenshavene, men vi er mest fascinert av noen få av dem. De har blitt berømte, som hvithaien, den ofte fotograferte tigerhaien og haien som hopper 30 meter over havoverflaten. Vi ser nærmere på historiene om de største haistjernene, som alle har mange følgere på sosiale medier.

programme.title: Født til å drepe
programme.desc: Krokodillen er det største rovdyret i reptilenes verden, men den trenger år med intensiv trening for å lære seg å bli så dødelig.

programme.title: Croc Wars: Grumeti Vs Mara
programme.desc: Hvert år krysser nesten to millioner gnuer og sebraer Serengetis to elver, Grumeti og Mara. Her venter dynastier av nilkrokodiller på sitt årlige etegilde. Men i krokodillenes verden er ikke alle drapsstrategier de samme. Fra brutale bakholdsangrep til frekke tyverier – disse smarte rovdyrene benytter seg av helt ulike taktikker under den viktige jakten på ett måltid i to elver.

programme.title: Most Wanted Sharks
programme.desc: Det finnes millioner av haier i verdenshavene, men vi er mest fascinert av noen få av dem. De har blitt berømte, som hvithaien, den ofte fotograferte tigerhaien og haien som hopper 30 meter over havoverflaten. Vi ser nærmere på historiene om de største haistjernene, som alle har mange følgere på sosiale medier.

programme.title: Killer Whale Chronicles
programme.desc: Spekkhoggere har lenge fascinert vitenskapsmenn på grunn av sin utrolige intelligens. Men nylige angrep på båter nær Gibraltar gjør at mange stiller spørsmål ved hvorvidt vi kjenner disse majestetiske vesenene. Vi tar en titt på innsiden av spekkhoggernes verden for å avsløre hvordan de utnytter havets rikdom perfekt, skaper “mote” og opprettholder kompleks familiestruktur. Fortalt av sanger og spekkhoggerentusiast Sarah Connor.

programme.title: Killer Whale Chronicles
programme.desc: Marinbiolog Florian Graner drar til Salishhavet for å se på den bemerkelsesverdige læringsoppførselen til spekkhoggerne. Vi går inn i verdenen til disse hvite og svarte kjempene, og ser på deres evne til å videreformidle kunnskap gjennom generasjoner. Fortalt av sanger og spekkhoggerentusiast Sarah Connor.

programme.title: Født til å drepe
programme.desc: Krokodillen er det største rovdyret i reptilenes verden, men den trenger år med intensiv trening for å lære seg å bli så dødelig.

programme.title: Jaguarer mot krokodiller
programme.desc: Den erfarne villmarksfotografen Steve Winter og kameramannen Bertie Gregory foreviger det utrolige livet til jaguarer i Brasil.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Vi er kjent som bakholdets mestere, og bruker rettsmedisinsk teknologi for å utforske hvordan nilkrokodiller har blitt eksperter på å jakte på trekkende flokker av gnuer og sebraer. Med et forbløffende nytt perspektiv på pasienten og presis taktikk de bruker for å sette opp drapet, ser vi på hvordan en snikende mannlig krokodille sikter mot sitt neste offer.

programme.title: Crocodile - Australias Greatest Survivor
programme.desc: Verdens største nåværende reptiler, Australias saltvannskrokodiller er eksperter i tålmodighet, kraft og overlevelse. I århundrer har menneskets aktiviteter – som jakt og befolkningsvekst – presset disse “sjefskrokodillene” til nær utryddelse. Vi avslører hvordan, mot alle odds, disse ekstraordinære skapningene fortsetter å eksistere.

programme.title: Croc Wars: Grumeti Vs Mara
programme.desc: Hvert år krysser nesten to millioner gnuer og sebraer Serengetis to elver, Grumeti og Mara. Her venter dynastier av nilkrokodiller på sitt årlige etegilde. Men i krokodillenes verden er ikke alle drapsstrategier de samme. Fra brutale bakholdsangrep til frekke tyverier – disse smarte rovdyrene benytter seg av helt ulike taktikker under den viktige jakten på ett måltid i to elver.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Overraskelser kommer i alle former og størrelser. En nymfekakadu har et skjevt nebb og dr. Lisa undersøker en gårdskatts blærelekkasje. Når en chihuahua ankommer timer senere med et akutt øyeproblem, beholder legene fokuset. En alvorlig skjønnhetsfeil dukker opp på en konkurransehund, og en hes hest sliter med å puste. Alle samarbeider for å gjøre Dianes bursdag ekstra spesiell.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.sub-title: Det bøtter på med katter og hunder
programme.desc: En ny sau er på vei til Pols gård, og familien ordner dreneringen i sauehuset. Den kalde vinteren er på vei, så det stinkende stedet må fikses raskt.

programme.title: Afrikas skjulte underverker
programme.desc: Sahara er verdens største ørken, et ekstremt miljø som dekker en stor del av Nord-Afrika. Det finnes nærmest ikke noe vann eller mat her, så på overflaten virker det som et øde sted. Men bak den tørre fasaden finnes det arter som har tilpasset seg til det tøffe landskapet.

programme.title: Afrikas skjulte underverker
programme.desc: I Etiopia finner vi ekstrem natur, fra frodige innsjøer til store fjelltopper der dyrelivet måtte tilpasse seg for å overleve. Et gammelt land som har huset liv siden tidenes morgen. Bortenfor ørkenen ligger det fjell som skjuler en skattkiste av dyreliv som knapt finnes noe annet sted i verden.

programme.title: Croc Wars: Grumeti Vs Mara
programme.desc: Hvert år krysser nesten to millioner gnuer og sebraer Serengetis to elver, Grumeti og Mara. Her venter dynastier av nilkrokodiller på sitt årlige etegilde. Men i krokodillenes verden er ikke alle drapsstrategier de samme. Fra brutale bakholdsangrep til frekke tyverier – disse smarte rovdyrene benytter seg av helt ulike taktikker under den viktige jakten på ett måltid i to elver.

programme.desc: Krokodillen er det største rovdyret i reptilenes verden, men den trenger år med intensiv trening for å lære seg å bli så dødelig.

programme.title: Most Wanted Sharks
programme.desc: Det finnes millioner av haier i verdenshavene, men vi er mest fascinert av noen få av dem. De har blitt berømte, som hvithaien, den ofte fotograferte tigerhaien og haien som hopper 30 meter over havoverflaten. Vi ser nærmere på historiene om de største haistjernene, som alle har mange følgere på sosiale medier.

programme.desc: Spekkhoggere har lenge fascinert vitenskapsmenn på grunn av sin utrolige intelligens. Fortalt av sanger og spekkhoggerentusiast Sarah Connor.

programme.title: Vilt liv: Den store frosten
programme.desc: Naturfotografen Bertie Gregory reiser til den arktiske delen av Canada, der en gruppe hardføre dyr har lært seg å overleve. Bertie trosser de lave temperaturene for å komme tettere på dyrene, som en selunge på sin første svømmetur.

programme.title: Vinterens skjulte undre
programme.desc: De krevende vinterforholdene er den største prøvelsen for dyrelivet i Asia. Bare de mest hardføre dyrene vil overleve fram til våren.

programme.title: Ultimate Animals: Høydepunkter
programme.desc: Sjøknelere har et slag like hardt som et pistolskudd, og løvens brøl kan høres av andre løver på femti kilometers avstand.

programme.title: Ultimate Animals: Høydepunkter
programme.desc: Kråker er like smarte som delfiner og kan snakke som papegøyer. Ulv kan jakte i tre dager i strekk i områder like store som staten Delaware.

programme.title: Asias Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Over hele Asia blir unge dyr kastet ut i ville kamper, og kjemper med nebb og klør for å i det hele tatt overleve. Hver eneste dag byr på nye utfordringer og farer.

programme.title: Secrets of the Penguins
programme.desc: I Antarktis avslører keiserpingviner de hemmelige båndene de trenger for å overleve.

programme.title: Asias ville hemmeligheter
programme.desc: Tigre avkjøler seg i det, slåss om det og venter på bytter ved det. Elefanter, neshorn og bøfler drikker store mengder av det. Storhornfugler og skjeggaper er også avhengige av det for å få skoger. Ussuri-brunbjørnen hadde ikke klart seg uten det. Enten det kommer med monsunregnet, gjennom issmeltingen i Himalaya, tidevannet eller snø, har alle dyrene et forhold til vannet.

programme.title: Asias Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Over hele Asia blir unge dyr kastet ut i ville kamper, og kjemper med nebb og klør for å i det hele tatt overleve. Hver eneste dag byr på nye utfordringer og farer.

programme.title: Secrets of the Penguins
programme.desc: I Antarktis avslører keiserpingviner de hemmelige båndene de trenger for å overleve.

programme.title: Secrets of the Penguins
programme.desc: Pingvinene som lever i Sørishavet er de tøffeste pingvinene i verden, med 40 millioner av dem stuet sammen på en steinete utpost. National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory trer inn i verdenen til klippehoppere, bøylepingviner og gulltopp-pingviner for å møte bråkete grupper av risikotakere, rebeller og uvanlige foreldre.

programme.title: Secrets of the Penguins
programme.desc: For millioner av år siden forlot en gruppe tøffe pingviner sin iskalde verden til fordel for et varmere klima der de ble satt på prøve. National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory ser på hvordan disse ekstraordinære pingvinene viser utrolig adferd som problemløsing, “snakking” og en nysgjerrighet for nye verdener.

programme.title: Asias ville hemmeligheter
programme.desc: Tigre avkjøler seg i det, slåss om det og venter på bytter ved det. Elefanter, neshorn og bøfler drikker store mengder av det. Storhornfugler og skjeggaper er også avhengige av det for å få skoger. Ussuri-brunbjørnen hadde ikke klart seg uten det. Enten det kommer med monsunregnet, gjennom issmeltingen i Himalaya, tidevannet eller snø, har alle dyrene et forhold til vannet.

programme.title: Ville Taiwan: Jungeløya
programme.desc: Taiwan er en helt unik øy. Den ligger ved Krepsens vendekrets, har tropiske strender, fuktig skog og snøkledde fjell.

programme.title: Amur-tigeren
programme.desc: "Secret Kingdom of the Amur Tiger" tar oss med inn i et øde kongerike for å avsløre hemmelighetene til noen mektige tigre. Man bruker viltkameraer, zoomobjektiver og droner for å følge dyrene tett. Vi får se hvordan tigrene tar seg gjennom og lever side om side i smale passasjer, bruker hemmelige meldinger for å kommunisere med hverandre, jakter på bytter og utnytter årstidene. Det endelige målet er å finne en partner og føre arten videre.

programme.title: Asias kjempeveps
programme.desc: I hjertet av enhver asiatisk kjempevepskoloni finner man en allmektig dronning. Hun forlater ett bol for å starte et annet, og fyller det raskt opp med en lojal hær av nådeløse drapsmaskiner som er villige til å ofre alt for å forsvare henne.

programme.title: Asias Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Over hele Asia blir unge dyr kastet ut i ville kamper, og kjemper med nebb og klør for å i det hele tatt overleve. Hver eneste dag byr på nye utfordringer og farer.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Alt føler som om det henger sammen når veterinærene ser mønstre i sakene sine. De behandler australian shepherds, bølger av dyr med pusteproblemer, og en rekke klumper og kuler som holder teamet travle. Selv om symptomene, rasene og navnene kan synes like, er ingen saker virkelig den samme.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol rykker ut til en gård etter et nødanrop, mens en stor snøstorm rammer det sentrale Michigan.

programme.title: Ville Alaska
programme.desc: Den kuperte kysten til USAs største stat har et utrolig dyreliv. Når vinteren svinner, gjør dyrene det meste ut av den lyse sommeren.

programme.title: Dyrehjelpen i Alaska
programme.desc: Teamene jobber døgnet rundt for å redde, rehabilitere og slippe ut ville dyr i Amerikas siste utpost. For miljøforkjemperne i Alaska har hver redning en vill vri – og disse babyene trenger en ekstra hånd å holde i for å klare seg.

programme.title: Asias Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Over hele Asia blir unge dyr kastet ut i ville kamper, og kjemper med nebb og klør for å i det hele tatt overleve. Hver eneste dag byr på nye utfordringer og farer.

programme.title: Ville Alaska
programme.desc: Den kuperte kysten til USAs største stat har et utrolig dyreliv. Når vinteren svinner, gjør dyrene det meste ut av den lyse sommeren.
